name: ReviewInc RES
description:
What does ReviewInc do?

ReviewInc specializes in review generation, focusing on tools and strategies to help businesses solicit and manage customer reviews effectively.

Source: G2

‍

Features

  • Schedule and automate review requests via email or SMS.
  • Personalize review request messages and responses to maintain brand consistency.
  • Seamless integration with CRM systems and other platforms for streamlined operations.
  • Utilize AI for sentiment analysis and to generate personalized responses.
  • Access detailed analytics to track review performance, sentiment trends, and customer feedback.
  • Ability to manage reviews across multiple locations or clients from one dashboard.
  • Tools to ensure compliance with review site policies and manage responses effectively.

Benefits:

  • Improve online reputation through proactive review generation and management.
  • Engage customers effectively, encouraging feedback and enhancing credibility.
  • Save time and resources with automated processes and efficient review management tools.
  • Boost visibility on search engines and review platforms, attracting more customers.

Pros

✅ Does what it claims and is very easy to set up

Cons

❌ A lot of customers complaint that it is not worth the price

Priced at $120 Per Month
